ModifyInstanceAttributes.name: Instance name; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1–65 characters.
ModifyInstanceAttributes.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame: enable: true, disable: false. Note: only instance types that support Jumbo Frame can enable this feature.
ModifyInstanceAttributes.netEthQueueCount: The updated number of NIC queues after modification.
